## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content performance is stagnant; plan to update meta titles/descriptions to improve CTR](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Expanding content clusters beyond initial 3 (pay social strategy, professional services, ABM); considering lower-funnel topics](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Focusing on Metadata's key differentiators: B2B targeting on Meta platforms, automation features, and comprehensive reporting](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Exploring ways to enhance content visually (e.g., simple graphics, video snippets) to improve engagement](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Optimization

  - [No new articles published last week; performance similar to previous week](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Plan to update meta titles and descriptions for all published content to improve CTR](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [33 articles published so far (24 new, 9 refreshes); 11 articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Considering content consolidation and removal of outdated/non-ranking pieces](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Refreshed articles showing improvement in average position](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [Nearly exhausted initial 3 content clusters (pay social strategy, professional services, ABM)](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Exploring expansion into new clusters while maintaining focus on core themes](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Considering mix of high-intent, low-volume keywords and more technical, product-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Targeting difficulty score below 40 for most keywords, with some exceptions for high-value terms](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Shifting focus slightly from executive-level to director/manager of demand gen audience](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Metadata's Key Differentiators

1.  Superior B2B targeting on Meta platforms (60% match rate vs. 10% native)
2.  Automation features for budget allocation and campaign management
3.  Comprehensive reporting from ad impression to closed-won deals

### Visual Content Enhancement

  - [Exploring addition of simple graphics, tables, or video snippets to break up text](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Considering use of existing Demand 2024 session videos in relevant articles](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Testing inclusion of CTA modules and potentially creating quick tutorial videos (e.g., 30-45 second Loom videos)](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to conduct additional keyword research, exploring existing clusters and new opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Anthony to review recent demos for common questions to inform content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Team to experiment with visual enhancements in select articles and measure impact](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Anthony to share info on new search campaigns and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Sadira to stage refreshed articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Anthony to review and approve content for removal/consolidation once list is created](https://fathom.video/share/msPabm1ueGxpWJNprjCikxmcMnsE7yCz?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
